message:
feat: add --no-toolbar option for app/kiosk mode

Hide the navigation bar for a cleaner app-like experience.
Perfect for running web apps like vscode.dev as terminal apps.

Usage:
  termweb open https://vscode.dev --no-toolbar

Also adds vscode-app.js example script.

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "termweb",
-  "version": "0.8.0",
+  "version": "0.8.1",
   "description": "Web browser in your terminal using Kitty graphics protocol. SDK for building terminal apps with web technologies.",
   "main": "./lib/index.js",
   "bin": {
